---
title: "In-Class Exercise_04"
author: "Albert Chia"
execute:
  eval: true
  echo: true
  warning: false
  freeze: true
---

![](images/clipboard-2421498342.jpeg)

In-Class_Ex04_Show me the statistics \| Tableau Public

![](images/clipboard-3003279858.jpeg)

In-Class_Ex04_Diverging Stacked Bar Chart \| Tableau Public
